posts.text: Venezuela vs the United States tomorrow in Miami is going to be BONKERS! If you haven’t watched the WBC yet, trust me, make plans to watch tomorrow night. It’s going to be phenomenal TV.

Venezuela vs the United States for the WBC title. Gonna be electric tomorrow in Miami. Make it happen @realDonaldTrump!


Clay Travis (@ClayTravis)

If Venezuela beats Italy tonight then President Trump should 100% throw out the opening pitch for the WBC Final in Miami tomorrow. Can you imagine that reception from both Venezuela and US fans in south Florida? Would be iconic.



— https://nitter.net/ClayTravis/status/2033695672654832039#m

If Venezuela beats Italy tonight then President Trump should 100% throw out the opening pitch for the WBC Final in Miami tomorrow. Can you imagine that reception from both Venezuela and US fans in south Florida? Would be iconic.

An Al Jazeera opinion piece on the American and Israel attacks on Iran — and how hugely successful and organized they have been — is somehow better analyzed than any American media piece I’ve read on Iran. Seriously, read it: aljazeera.com/opinions/2026/…

The culture shift is real, this Disney cruise ship ad aimed at dads is fantastic:

Video
Is the gay Iranian guy who was banging the ayatollah of Iran’s son the bravest gay man in the world?

I’ve said for a long time NBA won’t do Memphis & Nashville both. And I don’t think Memphis could ever move to Nashville. So I don’t think Nash will ever get an NBA team. But MLB is coming & we will then have NFL, MLB, NHL & MLS which is wild for a born and raised Nashville kid.

Seattle and Las Vegas are in line to get new NBA teams, @stephenasmith says Nashville should be in the NBA mix too. He’s right. But I think MLB will be next to come to Nashville. My bet is Salt Lake City and Nashville get MLB teams in a few years.

Video

Trump says he believes he will have the honor of taking Cuba. Asked what taking means, he says whatever he wants it to mean. Venezuela, Iran, Cuba, dictatorships are collapsing like in the Berlin Wall era:

Video

Anti-ICE protesters in Boston kept a child rapist from being arrested a month ago. Great job, guys. (Fortunately he has now been arrested).


Bill Melugin (@BillMelugin_)

WATCH: Four weeks ago, a frustrated ICE agent in the sanctuary city of Boston contacted me, telling me a group of anti-ICE agitators had just blown their operation to arrest a Salvadoran fugitive who is wanted in his home country on an arrest warrant for child rape & had been living near a Boston elementary school. 

He told m
CNN and MSNBC struggle to get as many 25-54 year old viewers as attend a single SEC or Big Ten football game in the fall.
Seems a bit homophobic. Totally unacceptable. The media should cover this disgusting anti-gay bias. Or at least talk about it.

Democrats refusal to talk about the fact that black and Hispanic people won’t vote for a gay white dude — Mayor Pete — is objectively hysterical. Their left wing white base loves Mayor Pete, but the minority voters won’t vote for him.


InteractivePolls (@IAPolls2022)

2028 Dem Primary Crosstabs (top 4)

Black Dems
🔹Harris: 31%
🔹Newsom: 16%
🔹AOC: 5%
🔹Pete: 2%
——
White Dems 
🔹Newsom: 20%
🔹Harris: 16%
🔹AOC: 12%
🔹Pete: 12%
——
Hispanic Dems 
🔹Harris: 27%
🔹Newsom: 21%
🔹AOC: 20%
🔹Pete: 3%

36 years in a row for Kansas in the NCAA tourney is an incredible streak.


FOX Sports (@FOXSports)

These schools have the longest active streaks of making the NCAA Men's Basketball Tournament 🔥

Which of these teams is making it the farthest this year?
